mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in retail sales signals improving household demand and near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:retail sales releases were available monthly before 2009-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests, with Rank IC below 0.03 over two consecutive 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals accelerating income loss and credit stress, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:March 2009 unemployment data were visible by 2009-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if mean triggered returns are not below unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: When policy rates are near zero and consumer prices are falling, the signal identifies a liquidity-trap deflation regime in which nominal easing fails to offset cash-flow stress, producing negative 60-day equity returns.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses below 0.5% and CPIAUCSL 3-month change crosses below 0%
evidence_refs: fact:federal funds rate was near the zero lower bound before 2009-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS-CPI trigger is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A turn from contraction to expansion in industrial production signals that inventory liquidation is ending and operating leverage is improving, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month growth crosses above 0% after being negative for at least 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:industrial production was a monthly observable before 2009-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if post-trigger 60-day S&P 500 returns are not higher than non-trigger periods or if the directional hit rate is below 50% in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: A severe housing-starts contraction signals weak construction demand, impaired household balance sheets, and tighter credit, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:housing starts data were available with monthly publication lags before 2009-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST contractions below -20% year over year are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A negative 3-month change in consumer prices signals deflation pressure that raises real debt burdens and depresses nominal revenue growth, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPI data released before 2009-04-15 showed disinflation risk
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL deflation triggers do not precede lower 20-day S&P 500 returns than baseline, or if Rank IC is nonpositive over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Joint declines in payroll employment and retail sales identify simultaneous income and spending weakness, causing earnings downgrades and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change crosses below 0 and RSAFS 3-month change crosses below 0
evidence_refs: fact:payroll and retail sales reports were visible before 2009-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-RSAFS contraction trigger has no incremental explanatory power over either single series or if triggered 20-day returns are positive in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real activity breadth, defined by rising payrolls and industrial production together, signals a transition from recession to expansion and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 1-month change crosses above 0 and INDPRO 1-month change crosses above 0
evidence_refs: fact:monthly labor and production indicators were available before 2009-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive breadth trigger is not followed by above-median 5-day S&P 500 returns or if the 5-day hit rate is below 50% in out-of-sample tests.
